SELECT json.filter(data, 0) AS first_elem, json.filter(data, 1) AS second_elem FROM json_data;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, data JSON);
SELECT d.id, json.filter(d.data, 1) FROM additional_data d INNER JOIN json_data j ON json.filter(j.data, 0) = json.filter(d.data, 0);
SELECT json.filter(data, 0) AS first_elem FROM json_data WHERE json.filter(data, 1) > 5;
SELECT json.filter(j.data, 0) FROM json_data j WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_data a WHERE a.id = 1 AND json.filter(a.data, 0) = json.filter(j.data, 0));
SELECT json.filter(data, 0) FROM json_data WHERE json.extract(data, '$') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json.filter(data, 0) FROM json_data WHERE LENGTH(data) > 10;
SELECT json.filter(info, 0) AS first_person, json.filter(info, 1) AS second_person FROM complex_json;
SELECT json.filter(info, 0) FROM complex_json WHERE json.filter(info, 0) IS NOT NULL;
